title: MPESB Van Rakshak, Jail Prahari Admit Card 2026 for 1679 Post
organization: MPESB Van Rakshak, Jail Prahari Admit
short_info: Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) has relased Van Rakshak & Kshetra Rakshak Karyapalik Van Vibhag, Jail Prahari Karyapalik Jail Vibhag and Jail Superintend Notification 2026. Those candidates who are Interested in this MPESB Van Rakshak, Jail Prahari & Other Post Exam 2026 can Apply Online from 28/02/2026 to 30/04/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information. Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) MPESB MP Van Rakshak & Kshetra Rakshak, Jail Prahari and Jail Superintend Combined Recruitment Test 2026 MPESB Van Rakshak Exam 2025 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / Other State : 560/- OBC / SC / ST : 310/- Portal Charges: Rs. 60/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking MPESB Van Rakshak, Jail Prahari
qualification: Read the Notification. Kshetra Rakshak 169 Class 10th High School Exam Passed Height Male : 163 CMS, Female 150 CMS. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
